## Testing

- [ ] Ran `npm test` — all tests pass
- [ ] Manually tested with `npx buildflow-dev init` in a scratch project
- [ ] If new command: installed into Claude Code and tested the slash command
- [ ] If changed install/uninstall: verified old command files are cleaned up correctly

## Checklist

- [ ] `package.json` version bumped if this is a release
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (or not applicable)
- [ ] New command added to `install.js` commandNames AND `uninstall.js` COMMAND_NAMES
- [ ] New command added to `templates/CLAUDE.md` quick reference table
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
